name: Khudkash Muhabbat
overview: Ahmed belongs to a lower-middle-class family however has a big dream, teaching in a religious institute. his dad is a driver in a house of a religious scholar. Ahmed Falls in love with Zaib she is the daughter of Mir Shahab. Mir Shahab announces the marriage of his daughter, will Ahmed and Zaib ended up together?
